title: Diagrams
description: Three views of the GDS: the compiled system graph, the architecture by role, and the canonical h = f∘g decomposition.

system.label: Compiled system (SystemIR)
system.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%%
flowchart TD
    classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f
    classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f
    classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d
    classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764
    classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b
    Spawn([Spawn]):::boundary
    Blue_Leader[Blue Leader]:::generic
    Red_Leader[Red Leader]:::generic
    Motion[Motion]:::generic
    Engagement[Engagement]:::generic
    Observe[Observe]:::generic
    Spawn --Blue World State--> Blue_Leader
    Spawn --Red World State--> Red_Leader
    Blue_Leader --Blue Task Weights--> Motion
    Red_Leader --Red Task Weights--> Motion
    Motion --Engaged Poses--> Engagement
    Motion --Observed Poses--> Observe
    Engagement -.Blue World State..-> Blue_Leader
    Engagement -.Red World State..-> Red_Leader

spec.label: Architecture by role (GDSSpec)
spec.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%% flowchart TD classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764 classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12 classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569 subgraph boundary ["Boundary (U)"] Spawn([Spawn]):::boundary end subgraph policy ["Policy (g)"] Blue_Leader[Blue Leader]:::policy Red_Leader[Red Leader]:::policy end subgraph mechanism ["Mechanism (f)"] Motion[[Motion]]:::mechanism Engagement[[Engagement]]:::mechanism end subgraph control ["Control"] Observe[Observe]:::control end entity_BlueTeam[("BlueTeam
position: r^B, velocity: v^B, active: a^B")]:::entity entity_RedTeam[("RedTeam
position: r^R, velocity: v^R, active: a^R")]:::entity Motion -.-> entity_BlueTeam Engagement -.-> entity_BlueTeam Motion -.-> entity_RedTeam Engagement -.-> entity_RedTeam style boundary fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e40af style policy fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#fbbf24,stroke-width:1px,color:#92400e style mechanism fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#4ade80,stroke-width:1px,color:#166534 style control fill:#f3e8ff,stroke:#c084fc,stroke-width:1px,color:#581c87

canonical.label: Canonical decomposition h = f∘g
canonical.mermaid:
%%{init:{"theme":"neutral"}}%% flowchart LR classDef boundary fill:#93c5fd,stroke:#2563eb,stroke-width:2px,color:#1e3a5f classDef policy fill:#fcd34d,stroke:#d97706,stroke-width:2px,color:#78350f classDef mechanism fill:#86efac,stroke:#16a34a,stroke-width:2px,color:#14532d classDef control fill:#d8b4fe,stroke:#9333ea,stroke-width:2px,color:#3b0764 classDef generic fill:#cbd5e1,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e293b classDef entity fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#475569,stroke-width:2px,color:#0f172a classDef param fill:#fdba74,stroke:#ea580c,stroke-width:2px,color:#7c2d12 classDef state fill:#5eead4,stroke:#0d9488,stroke-width:2px,color:#134e4a classDef target fill:#fca5a5,stroke:#dc2626,stroke-width:2px,color:#7f1d1d classDef empty fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,stroke-width:1px,color:#475569 X_t(["X_t
BlueTeam.position, BlueTeam.velocity, BlueTeam.active, RedTeam.position, RedTeam.velocity, RedTeam.active"]):::state X_next(["X_{t+1}
BlueTeam.position, BlueTeam.velocity, BlueTeam.active, RedTeam.position, RedTeam.velocity, RedTeam.active"]):::state Theta{{"Θ
F_flee, r0, eps, F_wall, F_chase, c, k_a, k_wall, k_r"}}:::param subgraph U ["Boundary (U)"] Spawn[Spawn]:::boundary end subgraph g ["Policy (g)"] Blue_Leader[Blue Leader]:::policy Red_Leader[Red Leader]:::policy end subgraph f ["Mechanism (f)"] Motion[Motion]:::mechanism Engagement[Engagement]:::mechanism end subgraph ctrl ["Control"] Observe[Observe]:::control end X_t --> U U --> g g --> f Motion -.-> |BlueTeam.position| X_next Motion -.-> |BlueTeam.velocity| X_next Motion -.-> |RedTeam.position| X_next Motion -.-> |RedTeam.velocity| X_next Engagement -.-> |BlueTeam.active| X_next Engagement -.-> |RedTeam.active| X_next f -.-> Observe Observe -.-> g Theta -.-> g Theta -.-> f style U fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa,stroke-width:1px,color:#1e40af style g fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#fbbf24,stroke-width:1px,color:#92400e style f fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#4ade80,stroke-width:1px,color:#166534 style ctrl fill:#f3e8ff,stroke:#c084fc,stroke-width:1px,color:#581c87
